overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game featuring a hooded protagonist in white robes exploring a historic Middle Eastern city. The character traverses an elevated stone terrace with ornate railings, passing a merchant stall and domed buildings, transitioning from walking to running and descending stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace with merchant stall overlooking courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the stone terrace, observing the historic architecture and courtyard below

notable_agents.action: merchant standing beside stall with blue and white canopy

entered.detail: wooden stall with blue and white fabric canopy and rolled carpets
ornate stone balustrade with geometric lattice patterns
multi-story stone building with repeating arched windows and doorways
large patterned rug covering the stone terrace floor
rounded metallic dome with weathered patina on adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit elevated terrace with ornate stone railings. A merchant stall with a blue and white canopy stands to the right, while historic stone buildings with arched windows fill the background. The protagonist walks slowly as a large metallic dome enters view from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop with panoramic city view

events.description: view opens to reveal distant cityscape with palm trees beyond the rooftops
character transitions from walking to running

agents.ego_description: walking past the dome structure then breaking into a run along the terrace

entered.detail: hazy view of distant buildings and palm trees on the horizon
multiple smaller domes visible on surrounding buildings
dark wooden staircase leading down to lower level

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the large dome as the view opens to a panoramic vista of the distant city. The merchant stall falls behind as the character transitions from walking to running along the terrace, approaching a wooden staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase descending to lower courtyard

events.description: character descends wooden stairs to lower courtyard level

agents.ego_description: running down the wooden stairs toward the lower courtyard

entered.detail: shadowed courtyard area visible below the staircase
rough stone wall lining the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character runs down a wooden staircase descending from the open terrace into a more enclosed space. The large dome and historic buildings fade from view as the perspective shifts downward toward the lower courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a sunlit elevated terrace that gradually descends into a more enclosed lower courtyard. It begins with the protagonist walking slowly past ornate stone railings and a blue and white merchant stall, while a large metallic dome emerges from the left against a backdrop of arched stone buildings. As the character moves past the dome, the view opens into a panoramic vista of the distant city and the pace quickens into a run. The scene then shifts as the character reaches a wooden staircase, descending away from the open terrace and the fading skyline. Finally, the perspective moves downward, leaving the historic domes behind as the character enters the confined space of the courtyard below.
